user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view a list of employee certifications with details like employee code, department, certification name, mandatory flag, status, completed date and valid till, so that I can track certification compliance across the team.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Certifications screen; When the page loads; Then a paginated list displays employee name, code, class, location, department, position level, certification name, mandatory flag, status, completed date and valid till

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter certifications by location, department, position level and employee name, so that I can narrow down to a specific group of employees.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Certifications screen; When I select filter values for location, department, position level or employee name and search; Then only matching certification records are listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter certifications by status (All, Pending, Completed) and by a specific certification, so that I can review outstanding or completed certifications.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Certifications screen; When I choose a status and select a certification; Then the list is filtered to matching records

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to reset all applied filters, so that I can start a fresh search without manually clearing each field.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied filters on the Employee Certifications screen; When I click Reset; Then all filter fields are cleared and the full list is restored

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to assign a certification to employees, so that required certifications are tracked and completed.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Certifications screen; When I click Assign certification and select a certification; Then the certification is assigned and appears in the employee's list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the certifications list, so that I can see the latest status updates.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Certifications screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current data
